<p class="key-answer" data-question="Tocilizumab 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Tocilizumab</strong> 目前有 <strong>3 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Tocilizumab 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：RoActemra, in combination with methotrexate (MTX), is indicated for  the treatment of severe, active and progressive rheumatoid arthritis (RA) in adults not previously treated with MTX. the treatment...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L1</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>ankylosing spondylitis（100.0%）</li>
<li>rheumatoid vasculitis（100.0%）</li>
<li>hypermobility of coccyx（100.0%）</li>
<li>spondyloarthropathy, susceptibility to（100.0%）</li>
<li>inflammatory spondylopathy（100.0%）</li>
<li>Kummell disease（100.0%）</li>
<li>polyarticular juvenile rheumatoid arthritis（100.0%）</li>
<li>vertebral disease（99.9%）</li>
<li>juvenile idiopathic arthritis（99.9%）</li>
<li>mendelian susceptibility to mycobacterial diseases due to complete IL12B deficiency（99.9%）</li>
<li>rheumatoid factor-positive polyarticular juvenile idiopathic arthritis（99.9%）</li>
<li>rheumatoid nodulosis（99.8%）</li>
<li>juvenile chronic polyarthritis（99.8%）</li>
<li>juvenile arthritis due to defect in LACC1（99.7%）</li>
<li>autosomal recessive familial Mediterranean fever（99.5%）</li>
<li>anti-glomerular basement membrane disease（99.2%）</li>
<li>WHIM syndrome（99.2%）</li>
<li>systemic mastocytosis（99.1%）</li>
<li>familial Mediterranean fever, autosomal dominant（99.1%）</li>
<li>psoriasis-related juvenile idiopathic arthritis（99.0%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>

</div>
